xau-xau-rice-teleculinaria.name: Xau Xau Rice
instructions: In a pot, put the salted water and let it boil. Add the rice, stir, cover the pot and let cook for 10 minutes. Remove from the fire, drain and reserve.
In a bowl, beat the eggs. Take a frying pan to the fire, put 1 tablespoon of oil, add the egg shakes, let cook, stir always, until the eggs are cooked. Remove from the fire and reserve.
In another frying pan, add the remaining oil and saute the bacon, add the pepper, washed, seed cleaned and cubed, and the peas. Season with salt and pepper, stir and let cook for 5 minutes.
De seguida, acrescente o arroz e os ovos mexidos, saltei tudo muito bem, junte o molho de soja e envolva. Retire do lume e sirva de seguida.
